chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 608 of 2023 Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 609 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on MA No.5044/2023 (S/A) 07.05.2024 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Bango, Advocate for applicants in both matters M/s Muhammad Hanif Maitlo and Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocates for Respondent No.5 Ms. Shabana Naheed, Assistant PG for the State along with SIP Jameel Ahmed Arain on behalf of SSP, Khairpur and SIP Talib Hussain, SHO Police Station, Baharo. >>>>>..<<<<< After hearing both the parties, these applications are disposed of with consent whereby SHO Police Station, Baharo, who is present, is directed to record statement of both the parties and if any cognizable offence is made out, register FIR accordingly and submit such report in accordance with law. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. Judge ARBROHI
